title: USDZ Layer Open Contract

included: opening an already-opened outer USDZ package resource
dispatch of .usda package entries to usda-layer-open
dispatch of .usdc package entries to usdc-layer-open
target-native LayerOpenResult pass-through from the selected handler
deferred: asset resolution inside package-relative asset paths

model.LayerOpenResult: The same target-native result returned by USDA and USDC layer handlers.
model.PackageEntryByteView: The non-owning entry byte view produced by usdz-package-format.

output.matches: true for .usdz packages and .usdz[entry] package spellings

laws: usdz-layer-open must consume usdz-package-format for ZIP/USDZ structure and must not parse central directories locally
usdz-layer-open must consume usda-layer-open for .usda entries and usdc-layer-open for .usdc entries

file_backed_path from the outer package must not be forwarded to an inner USDC handler unless it names the same byte extent; USDZ entries pass PackageEntryByteView bytes and leave standalone file_backed_path unset
unsupported .usd entries, nested .usdz entries, and missing entries must fail before parser-specific layer state is emitted
the domain result remains LayerOpenResult, not canonical dump JSON

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with USDZ layer-open ops and an opened_resource object.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results; dump fields are adapter-only.
